installCommand: cd web && corepack enable && corepack prepare pnpm@10.28.2 --activate && pnpm install && cd .. && ln -sfn web/node_modules node_modules

headers.value: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com; img-src 'self' data: blob:; font-src 'self' data: https://fonts.gstatic.com; connect-src 'self'; frame-ancestors 'none'; base-uri 'self'; object-src 'none'; form-action 'self' mailto:; upgrade-insecure-requests
